hero.intro: Clean, bold work with details that age well. Browse the portfolio and submit a request to book.

about.heading: About Nicholas
about.bodyOne: Nicholas focuses on clean, bold tattooing with details that hold up over time. His style blends fine line precision with black and grey depth, and every piece is built around flow, placement, and long-term readability.
about.bodyTwo: Bring your concept, references, and placement ideas. The request form handles the first review, then you'll get next steps if the project is a fit.

booking.heading: Tattoo Request
booking.intro: Fill this out and you'll get an email confirmation that your request is under review.
booking.fitNote: If it's a fit, you'll receive next steps for scheduling and deposit.

form.additionalInfoHint: Optional. Anything else you want me to know.
form.referencesHint: Upload photos that match your idea, placement, or style direction.
form.confirmationText: You'll receive a confirmation email that your request is under review.
form.successMessage: Submitted! You'll receive an email confirmation shortly.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: A few recent pieces. Tap to enlarge.
portfolio.emptyMessage: Portfolio images are being updated. Please check back soon.

whatToExpect.heading: What to Expect
whatToExpect.depositsBody: Deposits secure your appointment and go toward the final price. Deposits are non-refundable.
whatToExpect.rulesBody: Be on time. Stay hydrated. Don't show up sunburned. If you're sick, reschedule.
whatToExpect.aftercareBody: You'll get detailed aftercare instructions after your session-follow them to heal clean.

guidelines.heading: Studio Guidelines
items: Respect the artist's time (late arrivals may be cancelled).
You'll receive prep + aftercare instructions before/after your appointment.
